pages.text: $(bold)Enderbark Seed$()$(br2)The ender-slime tree of the dark islands. A Tinkers' slime tree.
pages.title: Enderbark Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant this seed to raise its dynamic tree.$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() this seed + $(italic)Dirt$() → $(italic)Ender Slime Sapling$() (shapeless, one-way).
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
